args.query: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.OwnerId AS AgentId, SUM(oi.Quantity * oi.UnitPrice) AS SalesAmount FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate BETWEEN '2022-06-25' AND '2022-11-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY SalesAmount DESC LIMIT 1;
